<!-- source-hash: 0edb7b222fa265b9797c30f441fd76a5 -->
Proxies HTTP requests from incoming servlet requests to configured external tool APIs, handling authentication header injection and URL resolution for integrated MSP tools.

## Key Components

- **`proxyApiRequest(String toolId, HttpServletRequest, String body)`** — Entry point that validates the tool exists and is enabled, resolves the target URI, builds auth headers, and delegates to `proxy()`.
- **`buildApiRequestHeaders(IntegratedTool)`** — Constructs request headers including `Content-Type`/`Accept` defaults and injects credentials based on `APIKeyType` (`HEADER`, `BEARER_TOKEN`, or `NONE`).
- **`proxy(IntegratedTool, URI, String method, Map headers, String body)`** — Executes the outbound HTTP request using Apache HttpClient 5, forwards headers and body, and returns the upstream status code and response body.
- **`createHttpRequest(String method, URI)`** — Maps HTTP method strings to typed Apache HC5 request objects (`HttpGet`, `HttpPost`, `HttpPut`, `HttpPatch`, `HttpDelete`, `HttpOptions`).
- **`createHttpClient()`** — Builds a shared `CloseableHttpClient` with a 10-second connection timeout and 60-second response timeout.

## Usage Example

```java
// Injected via Spring context
@RestController
public class ToolProxyController {

    private final RestProxyService proxyService;

    @RequestMapping("/tools/{toolId}/**")
    public ResponseEntity<String> proxy(
            @PathVariable String toolId,
            HttpServletRequest request,
            @RequestBody(required = false) String body) {

        return proxyService.proxyApiRequest(toolId, request, body);
    }
}
```

> **Note:** The service resolves tool API base URLs via `ToolUrlService` (type `API`) and builds the full target URI using `ProxyUrlResolver`, stripping the `/tools` prefix from the incoming path before forwarding.
